package_overview.purpose: Comprehensive evidence package for constitutional reconciliation between CUOS Foundation Laws (AAIS) and UCDD Standards Bundle (ULX IDE)
package_overview.reconciliation_approach: Service orchestration with Constitutional API Gateway
package_overview.evidence_scope: Full reconciliation framework, API boundary, infrastructure, security, and integration roadmap

evidence_components.purpose: Architectural evaluation of AAIS system for integration feasibility
key_findings: AAIS is a complex multi-component system requiring infrastructure
Constitutional frameworks are compatible but require reconciliation
Service orchestration is the recommended integration approach

evidence_components.purpose: Framework for reconciling CUOS Foundation Laws with UCDD Standards
key_findings: CUOS Foundation Laws mapped to UCDD Standards

evidence_components.purpose: Detailed API boundary specification with constitutional validation
Service orchestration architecture for ULX IDE and AAIS
Infrastructure setup plan for Redis, ChromaDB, Celery, FastAPI
4-phase integration roadmap with milestones and quality gates
key_findings: Risk management and success criteria defined

framework_reconciliation.reconciliation_method: API boundary with dual constitutional authority
framework_reconciliation.mapping_completeness: 6 CUOS laws mapped to 7 UCDD standards

evidence_reconciliation.ucdd_evidence: Generated by ULX IDE, validated at API boundary
evidence_reconciliation.cuos_evidence: Generated by AAIS, validated at API boundary
evidence_reconciliation.synchronization: Request ID correlation and audit trail synchronization

traceability_evidence.request_traceability: Request ID correlation across ULX IDE, API Gateway, and AAIS
traceability_evidence.evidence_traceability: UCDD and CUOS evidence linked via reconciliation protocol

security_evidence.authentication_evidence: CAT token system with JWT format and scope validation
security_evidence.encryption_evidence: TLS 1.3 for transport, AES-256 for data at rest
security_evidence.audit_evidence: Comprehensive logging of all security operations

infrastructure_evidence.service_evidence: Redis, ChromaDB, Celery, FastAPI configured with constitutional requirements

integration_readiness_evidence.api_readiness: API boundary specification with constitutional validation
integration_readiness_evidence.infrastructure_readiness: Infrastructure setup plan with Docker configuration
integration_readiness_evidence.roadmap_readiness: 4-phase integration roadmap with milestones and quality gates

constitutional_risks.mitigation: Escalation protocol and joint constitutional council

quality_gates_evidence.phase_1_gate: Constitutional API Gateway with CAT validation and UCDD/CUOS compliance
quality_gates_evidence.phase_2_gate: AAIS service operational with CUOS Foundation Law enforcement
quality_gates_evidence.phase_3_gate: ULX IDE integrated with constitutional evidence generation
quality_gates_evidence.phase_4_gate: Production deployment with full constitutional compliance validation

technical_success: Security testing with no critical vulnerabilities

immediate_next_steps: Begin Phase 1: Constitutional Foundation and API Gateway
Assemble development team with constitutional expertise

constitutional_authority_sign_off.ucdd_authority_review: PENDING - UCDD Standards Bundle governance review
constitutional_authority_sign_off.cuos_authority_review: PENDING - CUOS Foundation Laws governance review
